color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Supplier / Admin
configure pricing, catalog,
zones, factories, warehouses

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Retailer
browse suppliers,
build cart, place order

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Warehouse Admin
watch stock and forecast,
raise supply request

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Factory Admin
accept request, produce,
plan transfer and manifest

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Payload / Payloader
load truck, inject changes,
seal or flag manifest

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Driver
receive route, drive stops,
offload and verify payment

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Platform Backbone
APIs, Spanner, Redis,
Kafka, AI, notifications

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Realtime Hubs
retailer, driver, payload,
warehouse, fleet

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Supplier / Admin
review dashboard, CRM,
analytics, finance

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Warehouse Admin
receive transfer or record
shortage and exceptions

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Supplier / Admin
approve overrides, returns,
manual resolution

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Loop closes:
analytics, CRM,
replenishment, next order
